about.title: About
about.description: I'm a software engineer passionate about building AI-powered solutions for complex business problems. With experience spanning full-stack development, data engineering, and machine learning, I specialize in creating systems that augment human decision-making.
about.focus: Currently focused on agentic AI architectures, LLM orchestration, and corporate performance management automation.

cpm.title: CPM Agent Accelerator
cpm.description: Multi-agent AI platform for Corporate Performance Management. Automated consolidation review and performance analysis with real-time workflow orchestration, DAG execution, and executive narrative generation.
cpm.highlights: 9 specialized AI agents · Real-time SSE streaming · 3 languages (EN/ES/JA)
